title: Test Pipeline Auto-Migrate
description: Testing that migrate runs automatically after manual job add.

title: Principal Program Manager
description: YunoJuno is a freelance management platform connecting companies with top-tier contractors. They are hiring a Principal Program Manager to lead contingent workforce solution delivery. The role involves managing client accounts, driving process improvement, and ensuring seamless delivery of freelance workforce solutions. YunoJuno serves 7,000+ clients including Google, Netflix, Deliveroo, and the BBC. HQ in Fitzrovia, London. Hybrid working.

title: Infrastructure (Wifi Refresh) Project Manager
description: Infrastructure Project Manager - Wi-Fi / Network Deployment. London (4 days onsite + site travel). £360-£460/day (Outside IR35). 5-month initial contract. ASAP start. Managing delivery of Wi-Fi migrations across key sites. Leading rollout of authentication and customer portal solutions. Coordinating MSPs, suppliers, and field engineers. Driving timelines, risks, issues, and delivery milestones.
